name: twork/faq-accordion-item
title: FAQ Accordion Item
description: Single FAQ accordion item with question, answer, and optional default open state.

question.default: What products does Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry make?

answer.default: We specialize in premium butter (ထောပတ်) and ghee under the Shwe Myanmar (ရွှေမြန်မာ) brand.

attributes.question: What products does Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry make?
attributes.answer: We specialize in premium butter (ထောပတ်) and ghee under the Shwe Myanmar (ရွှေမြန်မာ) brand.
